title: Simplifying Logic Circuits Using Don't-Care Conditions
description: A flowchart demonstrating the process of identifying and utilizing don't-care conditions in a truth table to achieve a more simplified and optimized Boolean expression.
relationships: Process starts with the Original Truth Table
The designer Identifies Don't-Care outputs for invalid input combinations
For each 'X', a value (0 or 1) is Chosen based on which leads to better simplification
A new K-Map is created with these chosen values
Groups are formed on the K-Map to cover all 1s (and selected 'X's)
A Simplified Boolean Expression is derived from these groups
This expression is used to build the final Optimized Logic Circuit
